I don't really have any business there right now.
フキダシアイコンの消去
フキダシアイコンの消去
アニメーションタイプ = def
I found Shino poring over a notebook. Is she getting ready for her tutoring work?
\se[14-nb]It's almost time for me to go over and tutor Keiichi-kun~.
Seeing her enjoying it so much got me curious too,
so I asked her about the work.
\se[2]\SA[124]Yep, it's difficult to teach others but it's also pretty fun,
and Keiichi-kun's a really good boy so I can just about manage.
\SE[8]I'm being paid pretty handsomely, as like a bonus?
Since he asked me to be his tutor out of nowhere.
I'm not sure whether I'm providing all that much value for how much I'm getting...
\se[13-nb]But I want to help onee-chan with the finances as much as I can,
so I'm just going to give it my best shot.
\SE[0]Ah, it's about time~. I'm off then~.
スライドスピード = def
I waved at her, and saw her off towards the path to Keiichi-kun's home.
Maybe I'll do my best too.
...Though I'll have to find something to do my best on first.
Would you like to view [Shino's viewpoint]?
(You can view it at any time from the Room of Recollections.)

...Not feeling like just staying at home tonight, I was wandering around town
when I saw Rino nee-san at the local park.

\se[24-nb]\SA[133]If you keep walking around late at night like this, you might just get pushed 
down by me, you know~?
Doing that sort of thing with her... this late at night, in the park?
It'd be a dream come true more than anything else.
\SE[1]...Really, what's got you out so late?
[I should ask you the same] ...is what I was about to say, when I noticed.
She was smiling, sure, but it was one that she was
\SE[25-nb]...Ahahah, you noticed? Well, I'm out here in this place,
at this time, so of course you'd notice that at least something's up.
The Rino nee-san I know goes straight home from the office, and rambles
about random things to her sister while chugging her beloved booze.
Compared to that, this version of her was definitely a bit different.
...Sorry, I'll go back to being normal in no time, so could you keep me company for a bit?
The person I respect the most, the one that I always thought was
out of my reach, was relying upon me.
[If you're fine with me, I'm always available], I responded to her,
without putting up any sort of pretense.
\SE[5]...I ended up making a big mistake at work, you see.
Rino nee-san, the rising star of the department, always full
-- or so I've heard her being called, and when I did have
the chance to see her working, she perfectly matched that image.
A wonderful adult, that both Shino and I look up to.
But, she's also human, so it's only natural for her to...
\SE[12-nb]It was a much bigger mistake, than I think you can imagine, \n[2].
[Everyone makes mistakes] ...or so I would have liked to say,
but I quickly swallowed up those words.
They're words that would be well received, from someone of equal footing.
But they are... definitely not words, that I can use to comfort her right now.
Suddenly, I remembered an event from the other day.
My old man and Rino nee-san were talking about something,
in front of our apartment building. ...Was that related to this?
\SE[2]And so, looking at just the result... it ended without incident, more or less.
That's good, I thought while sighing in relief.
But, if that's so when why's she here...
\se[24-nb]But it caused a whole lot of trouble, for a certain person.
Though I didn't want to hear his name, in this one instance, I could understand.
Although I didn't have all that good of an image of him, I know that
he's quite the brilliant and reliable manager at the company.
\SE[12-nb]Without caring that it might have affected his own evaluation,
he worked overtime to cover for my mistakes.
\se[16-nb]While I was panicking and worrying my head off about what to do,
he quietly took care of everything behind the scenes.
\SE[5]He didn't just help me get into the company,
he even cleaned up this mess for me... you know?
\SE[12-nb]I just don't know how I'm going to repay this debt.
\SE[5]I thought that I'd finally become a splendid adult for
you and Shino to look up to.
But in the end, I'm still just an overgrown child, nothing more.
\se[16-nb]What do I even do? If I keep needing someone to protect me like this...
I tried to think of words to comfort her, yet I managed to
voice none of them... and they all disappeared into the sky.
It's frustrating, but the only one who can clear up her worries is...
-- someone of equal, or greater footing...
Perhaps, only she herself might be able to do it.
\se[22-nb]Fufuh--... Thanks for hearing me out like this.
\SE[11-nb]When you see me next time, I'll be back to my usual sweet,
pretty, perfect and... a bit lewd onee-san self.
\se[23-nb]So, I'm sorry, go back home without me, okay?
I'll do as she said. There's nothing I can do for her as I am, after all.
スライドスピード = def
I waved goodbye to her, and started walking back home.
I wondered if the day would come when I'll be an equal adult to her,
someone who'd be able to stand by her side and support her--
The moon up in the sky was lost between the clouds.
It felt as if it was a reflection of my own heart.
Would you like to view [Rino's Viewpoint]?
(You can view it at any time from the Room of Recollections.)

Suddenly, I remembered an event from the other day.
My old man and Rino nee-san were talking about something,
in front of our apartment building. ...Was that related to this?
\SE[2]And so, looking at just the result... it ended without incident, more or less.
That's good, I thought while sighing in relief.
But, if that's so when why's she here...
\se[24-nb]But it caused a whole lot of trouble, for a certain person.

Although I didn't have all that good of an image of him, I know that
he's quite the brilliant and reliable manager at the company.
\SE[12-nb]Without caring that it might have affected his own evaluation,
he worked overtime to cover for my mistakes.
\se[16-nb]While I was panicking and worrying my head off about what to do,
he quietly took care of everything behind the scenes.
\SE[5]He didn't just help me get into the company,

\SE[12-nb]I just don't know how I'm going to repay this debt.
\SE[5]I thought that I'd finally become a splendid adult for
you and Shino to look up to.

\se[16-nb]What do I even do? If I keep needing someone to protect me like this...

\SE[0]Huh, why're you here, \n[1]? You really caught me
off-guard, I wasn't expecting to see you here~
\SE[38-nb]Me? I am... nnn, spacing out... I guess?
\SE[0]Ah, don't misunderstand though, okay? I'm not feeling down or anything.
I just felt nostalgic about this place, that's all.
\SE[18]Fufuh--, we used to play here a whole lot, didn't we?
\SE[21]I was just thinking back to it, about what sorts of things we used to think about,
and how we used to spend our time, and before I knew it a whole lot of time passed.
\SE[54-nb]Eheheh, did you see my tweet and get worried about me?
Or am I just overthinking it? ...If you did though, thanks.
Just like she said, as far as I can tell, she doesn't seem to be depressed.
I can understand her desire to be alone too, so maybe I
shouldn't be in her way here.
\se[40-nb]Hey, since we're here alone like this anyway.
\SE[26]Wanna do something embarrassing that we can't... when other people are around?
Something that'd be too embarrassing to do with people around, does she...?
Rino nee-san maybe, but Shino's not the type to joke around at moments like these.
Whether I wanted it to or not, my heart started pounding.
Shino herself took the first step, so I should prepare myself too.
\SE[38-nb]Do you want to go all out and have fun here? Like we used to?
Of course, she's not Rino nee-san. There's no way Shino
would ever ask for something like that.
For sure, I can see why it'd be too embarrassing to do with people around,
and I thought that it might be something fun to do for once too.
I shook off the pink colored imagination that overtook my brain over what I
imagined she was asking, and replied with a [W-Why not?].
\SE[22]Oh, you're actually up for it, for once. Fufuh--, let's do it then!
スライドスピード = def
And so we messed around in the park for a bit, just like when we were kids.
We played around on the swings and slides to our hearts' content, laughing all the while.
\se[32-nb]Eheheh... Fuuuuh~, I'm beat~♪ That was so fun~
She breathed out a sigh of satisfaction while looking as pretty as ever.
...Come to think of it, she was a genius at messing around all
day without getting a single bit of dirt on her clothes, wasn't she?
Fufuh--, I had a ton of fun... wanna do this again sometime?
\SE[27]Eheheh... Ah, right. \sa[132]It's not like a thanks or anything for
playing with me like that but... here, have this.
As she said that, she took out something resembling a
charm and handed it to me.
\SE[26]It's a charm wishing for your health and luck.
Always walk around with this charm full of my feelings in your pocket~
I did as she said, and stuffed it in my pocket while thanking her.
I felt honestly happy that she felt this way about me, enough to make me a charm.
\sa[124]\SE[22]Well then, shall we go home~? Yeah, let's go home~!
It's never boring with her around... and as I thanked her in my heart
I followed right behind her as we made our way back home.

\SM[pop]\SE[24]Huh? What's got you up so early~?
\sm[26]Morning walks are so nice, aren't they~? I'm thinking of heading
to the cafe downtown next, so I thought I'd burn some
\sm[38-nb]By the way. And I know this is off topic.
But I actually feel pretty jealous of people out walking their dogs.
I'd love to have a cat or a dog in the future~
\sm[18]Hey hey, \n[1]. Which would you prefer? A little doggy?
\SM[double]\sm[32-nb]Fufuh--, I see I see. I'll keep that in mind~♪
I saw Ayano oba-san at the park letting out a deep sigh, before putting her
mouth onto a nutrient supplement pack. I wonder what she's doing out so late.
What's got you out here this late?
\sa[130]\SE[25-nb]It's dangerous out this late, you know?
You're not an adult yet either...
I lightly apologized for venturing outside so late, and then
asked her what she was doing herself.
\SE[28-nb]I am just... taking a small break, that's all.
Fufuh--, there's not really a day or night as far as my job is concerned,
so I just ended up overdoing it a bit, that's all.
\SE[12-nb]I'm not getting any younger, and my eyes and back aren't what they used to be, you know?
Ah, I'm fine though, okay? I still know a thing or two about self defense.
\SM[double]\SE[5-nb]Even if some random men start trying things, I can easily take on three at once♪
I can make them go weak in the knees in but a second~♪
...Come to think of it, back when Rino nee-san was in school and was
getting harrassed by some guy, Ayano oba-san spun him around
like nothing and pushed him to the ground easily.
I swallowed the words I was about to say, ["Shall I drop you off at home?"],
and decided to obediently go straight home myself instead.
I love that side of you, \n[2].
Did she read what I was thinking from my face? Surprised
by the depth of her insight, I hid my cheeks out of embarrassment.
\SE[10-nb]See you later then. Go straight home, okay?
Ah, tell your father I said hello.
It's only thanks to him that I can do work like this, you know.

I gave a slight bow to Ayano oba-san and left.
...I can't bring myself to like my old man but, seeing that expression full of
gratitude on her face, made me realize again how amazing he is.
Would ya like ta join our little party too, boy?
Size and girth are the most important things!

I want to see her once more!
